title: medicago italica var. spinosa
intro: Medicago italica var. spinosa, also known as Italian broom or yellow trefoil, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Medicago genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Medicago italica var. spinosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications like creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
